data:
About
Practical software for ordinary routines. Keelmark creates small Android apps that help people make clear decisions in everyday situations.
What Keelmark builds Keelmark products are designed around routine, repeatable tasks where a small amount of clarity can remove a surprising amount of uncertainty.
The first product is Dosewise, a medication timing and dose logging app for Android. It focuses on recording what was taken, when it was taken, and when the next dose is due.
How the apps are designed Clarity first An app should make the next useful action obvious. It should not require training, ritual, or interpretive dance.
Privacy by default Personal information should stay personal wherever possible. Keelmark apps are designed to avoid unnecessary accounts and unnecessary data collection.
Focused features A product should earn its place on your phone by solving a real problem well.
Maintenance Software changes. Devices change. Android changes because apparently stillness is illegal. Keelmark aims to keep its apps maintained, documented, and understandable.

Contact
Contact Keelmark For product questions, support, privacy queries, or boringly necessary administrative matters, use the email address below.
Email hello@keelmark.co.uk
Include the app name, device model, Android version, and a short description of the issue where relevant.
Support notes Keelmark apps are maintained independently. Support is handled as capacity allows, with priority given to bugs that affect core use.

Privacy
Privacy Policy Keelmark products are designed to avoid unnecessary accounts, tracking, and data collection.
Summary Dosewise is designed as a local-first Android app. Medication records are intended to remain on your device unless a future feature clearly states otherwise and asks for the relevant permission.
Information collected Dosewise may store information you enter into the app, such as medication names, dose timing rules, and dose history. This information is used to provide the app's core functionality.
Keelmark does not sell personal data. Good grief, imagine choosing that as the business model.
Device storage App data is stored on the device unless the app explicitly introduces a feature that uses external storage, backup, sync, or account-based services.
Analytics and diagnostics If analytics or crash reporting are added, this policy should be updated to identify the service, the information collected, and how users can control it.
Contact For privacy questions, contact hello@keelmark.co.uk.
This is a practical starter privacy policy, not legal advice. Before publishing on Google Play, check it against the final app behaviour and Play Console requirements.

Products
Android apps from Keelmark. Keelmark products are practical tools for everyday routines. The first app is Dosewise.
Medication timing Dosewise Record medication doses, check timing, and keep a clear history on Android.
View Dosewise Multiple medications Daily and weekly schedules Dose history Designed for local use

Dosewise
Medication timing and dose logging for Android. Dosewise helps you record medication doses, check when the next dose is due, and keep a clear dose history.
What it is for Medication can become so familiar that it is easy to forget whether you have just taken a dose. Dosewise is built around that very ordinary problem.
The app is intended to help with routine tracking: what was taken, when it was taken, and what the timing rules say about the next dose.
Dosewise is not medical advice and does not decide what medication you should take. Medication instructions should come from your clinician, pharmacist, or the medicine label.
Core features Dose recording Record when a medication was taken and keep a history of previous doses.
Timing checks See whether enough time has passed before the next dose.
Medication setup Add medications with dose rules, daily limits, and schedule details.
Weekly routines Support for medicines taken on selected days rather than only daily intervals.
Readable history A clear record helps answer the question: what happened today?
Local first Designed to work without an unnecessary account. Add cloud features only if they earn their keep.
Availability Dosewise is being prepared for Android. Replace this section with the live Google Play link when the listing is ready.
